case_title: CITIBANK, N.A. VS. KHAI T HA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. (SEE CCP 704.225.) THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $1,200 TO PLAINTIFF TO SERVICE THE DEBT. ALL OTHER FUNDS SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE DEBTOR. THE COURT WILL ISSUE A JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM OF ORDER REFLECTING THE TENTATIVE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

CRC 3.740 REVIEW - JUDGMENT ON FILE

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. HEARING ON DEFENDANT KHAI THANH HA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 2, 2023 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, OCT-11-2023. RE: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE MATTER IS DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHOWS THAT THE FUNDS ARE NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT. (CCP 704.225.) SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS.

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Donald Sherrill, Esq., via Zoom, Hunt & Hennques, LLP, (800) 680-2426, for Creditor.

Khai T. Ha, in court, Debtor in propria persona.

Hong Ha, Certified Vietnamese Interpreter, Cert. no. 300215, in court, assisting Debtor.

RE: Hearing on Claim of Exemption.

The matter is discussed. At conclusion of discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, the court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant's claim of exemption is granted. Defendant shows that the funds are necessary for his support. (CCP 704.225.)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Donald Sherrill, Esq., Hunt &. Henriques, LLP, 408-362-2270 for Plaintiff.
Khai T. Ha, 415-812-5406, Pro per Defendant.
Hon Ha, court Certifeid Vietnamese Interperter #300215

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Defendant's claim of exemption is granted in part. (See CCP 704.225.) The levying officer is directed to release $1,200 to plaintiff to service the debt. All other funds shall be released to the debtor.

The Couort will issue a judicial council form of order reflecting the tentative.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Continued To Mar-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Appearances:
Khai Thanh Ha, Tel:415.812.5406, claimant/defendant, appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

Mr. Khai Thanh Ha did not give notice to plaintiff that he was appearing for today's hearing. He also requires the assistance of a Vietnamese interpreter.

Defendant's Hearing on Claim of Exemption is continued to March 2, 2023 at 9:30am in Department 302.

The Court to give notice of the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302/RBU)
